description: Vendor/version support metadata for CFML constructs. This file is intended to be consumed by tooling that wants to filter the grammar/features by engine (ACF vs Lucee) and version.

constructs.name: cfquery
constructs.notes: Database query tag whose body is parsed using the cfquery-sql dialect. Present in both ACF and Lucee from earliest supported versions.

constructs.name: cfscript
constructs.notes: CFScript block tag. Supported by both ACF and Lucee.

constructs.name: cfxml
constructs.notes: XML processing tag. Supported by both ACF and Lucee.

constructs.name: cftransaction
constructs.notes: Transaction control tag for database operations. Supported by both ACF and Lucee.

constructs.name: QueryExecute
constructs.notes: Function form of cfquery whose SQL argument is parsed using the cfquery-sql dialect. Present in both ACF and Lucee CFML function references.

constructs.name: QueryNew
constructs.notes: Creates an in-memory query object. Available in both ACF and Lucee.

constructs.name: QueryAddRow
constructs.notes: Adds a row to an in-memory query. Available in both ACF and Lucee.

constructs.name: QueryAddColumn
constructs.notes: Adds a column to an in-memory query. Available in both ACF and Lucee.

constructs.name: QueryEach
constructs.notes: Iterates over query rows with a callback. Available in both ACF and Lucee.

constructs.name: NOT
constructs.notes: Logical NOT operator. Supported by both ACF and Lucee.

constructs.name: XOR
constructs.notes: Logical XOR operator. Supported by both ACF and Lucee.

constructs.name: MOD
constructs.notes: Modulo operator (MOD keyword). Supported by both ACF and Lucee.

constructs.name: CT
constructs.notes: Contains operator (CT). Documented in Lucee operators; available in ACF as part of CFML expression language.

constructs.name: NCT
constructs.notes: Does not contain operator (NCT). Documented in Lucee operators; available in ACF as part of CFML expression language.
Not-equal comparison operator. Supported by both ACF and Lucee.
Integer division operator. Documented in Lucee; also available in ACF expression language.

constructs.name: variables
constructs.notes: Standard CFML VARIABLES scope. Present in both ACF and Lucee from earliest versions.

constructs.name: arguments
constructs.notes: Standard CFML ARGUMENTS scope. Present in both ACF and Lucee from earliest versions.

constructs.name: session
constructs.notes: Standard CFML SESSION scope. Present in both ACF and Lucee from earliest versions.

constructs.name: application
constructs.notes: Standard CFML APPLICATION scope. Present in both ACF and Lucee from earliest versions.

constructs.name: cfquery-sql
constructs.notes: SQL dialect used inside cfquery bodies and QueryExecute(...) calls. Models common SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE forms, joins, unions, expressions, and parameter syntaxes shared by Adobe ColdFusion and Lucee. Dialect-friendly toward common PostgreSQL/MySQL/SQL Server usage (e.g. TOP, LIMIT/OFFSET, ILIKE) without being a fully versioned RDBMS grammar.

constructs.name: cfqoq-sql
constructs.notes: Query-of-Queries dialect used when cfquery specifies dbtype="query". Shares syntax with cfquery-sql but executes against in-memory query objects.

constructs.name: cfhql-sql
constructs.notes: HQL/ORM query dialect used when cfquery specifies dbtype="hql". Parsed with the same tolerant cfquery-sql grammar but semantically targets HQL/ORM queries.
